title: Test Wire CLI entrypoint and interactive TUI runtime

handoff_summary.completed: Updated `tests/test_orchestrator.py` with coverage for `command_tui` argument forwarding into `run_tui` and for the successful TUI merge-confirmation path, then ran the targeted CLI/TUI unittest slice successfully (17 tests passed).
handoff_summary.remaining: No further tester-scope work identified for B0032. Residual limitation: the real Textual app runtime was not exercised end-to-end because `textual` is not available in this environment; coverage remains at the unit level around the runtime state and missing-dependency path.
handoff_summary.risks: Any downstream change to `src/codex_orchestrator/cli.py` or `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` can break the CLI-to-TUI handoff or merge-confirmation flow; rerun the targeted TUI unittest slice after such edits.
handoff_summary.next_action: Proceed with downstream review or integration using the updated TUI-focused test coverage.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Downstream work that edits the CLI parser, `command_tui`, or `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` should rerun the TUI-focused unit tests because CLI argument wiring, selection state, filter ordering, and merge confirmation behavior are coupled there.

conflict_risks: Downstream work that edits the CLI parser, `command_tui`, or `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` should rerun the TUI-focused unit tests because CLI argument wiring, selection state, filter ordering, and merge confirmation behavior are coupled there.

execution_history.summary: Deferred due to file-scope conflict with active bead B0032-docs
Added focused test coverage for the TUI bead’s remaining wiring gaps and validated the CLI/TUI unit slice successfully.

guardrails.template_text:
# Tester Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Add or update automated tests, run validation, and report defects or missing coverage.

Allowed actions:
- Write or update tests relevant to the assigned bead.
- Run targeted checks and summarize failures clearly.
- Make minimal test-enablement fixes only when strictly necessary to execute or stabilize the tests.

Disallowed actions:
- Implement feature logic beyond minimal test-enablement work.
- Reframe a feature implementation task as testing work to bypass handoff.
- Perform review signoff or broad documentation rewrites.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON describing test coverage, validation status, and follow-up needs.
- Precise defect or coverage notes when the bead cannot be completed within tester scope.
